text.div:
Id: IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnly
Url: IMMZ.D2.DT.Polio.IPV-only
Version: 0.2.0
Title: IMMZ.D2.DT.Polio.IPV-only
Status: draft
Type:

system: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/plan-definition-type

code: eca-rule

Date: 2026-03-29 17:23:09+0000
Publisher: WHO
Description:

IMMZ.D2.DT.Polio.IPV-only Inactivated polio vaccine (IPV)-only (in countries, in polio-free regions, with a very low risk of importation and sustained high routine immunization coverage (third dose of the diphtheria–tetanus–pertussis vaccine [DTP3] > 90%)
Knowledge Capability: computable
Related Artifacts:

References

  • WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)
Libraries:
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Actions:
Determine if the client is due for a poliovirus vaccination according to the national immunization schedule: Determine if the client is due for a poliovirus vaccination according to the national immunization schedule Inactivated polio vaccine (IPV)-only (in countries, in polio-free regions, with a very low risk of importation and sustained high routine immunization coverage (third dose of the diphtheria–tetanus–pertussis vaccine [DTP3] > 90%)
If: Applicability: Client is due for IPV vaccination (Client is due for IPV vaccination)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('draft')
intent: ('proposal')
medication: (Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE31', display: 'Inactivated polio vaccines' } }, display: 'Inactivated polio vaccines' })
Determine if the client is due for a poliovirus vaccination according to the national immunization schedule: Determine if the client is due for a poliovirus vaccination according to the national immunization schedule Inactivated polio vaccine (IPV)-only (in countries, in polio-free regions, with a very low risk of importation and sustained high routine immunization coverage (third dose of the diphtheria–tetanus–pertussis vaccine [DTP3] > 90%)
If: Applicability: Primary series is complete. Client is due for IPV booster dose (Primary series is complete. Client is due for IPV booster dose)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('draft')
intent: ('proposal')
medication: (Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE31', display: 'Inactivated polio vaccines' } }, display: 'Inactivated polio vaccines' })
Check for Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Polio.IPV-only.: Show Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Polio.IPV-only.
If: Applicability: Has Guidance (Has Guidance)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Guidance)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

extension.valueString: IMMZElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  [Immunization] I
    where I.status = 'completed'
    and I.isSubpotent is not true
IMMZD2DTPolioElements
Polio Doses Administered to Patient

/*
@internal: Polio containing Doses Administered to Patient
*/
define "Polio Doses Administered to Patient":
  Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I
  where
    I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Poliovirus-containing vaccines"
IMMZD2DTPolioElements
Polio Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Polio Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Number of Polio Primary Series Doses Administered
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
No poliovirus primary series doses were administered
IMMZEncounterElements
Current Patient Age In Weeks

/** 
 * @dataElement Patient age in weeks
 */
define "Current Patient Age In Weeks":
  AgeInWeeksAt(Today)
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Client's age is less than 6 weeks
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Client is not due for IPV vaccination Case 1
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
One poliovirus primary series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Polio Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Date of Latest Polio Dose
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
The latest poliovirus dose was administered less than 4 weeks ago
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Client is not due for IPV vaccination Case 2
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Two poliovirus primary series doses were administered
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Client is not due for IPV vaccination Case 3
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Client is not due for IPV vaccination
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Client is not due for IPV vaccination Guidance

/*
@output: Client is not due for IPV vaccination Guidance
@guidance = Shold not vaccinate client with first IPV dose as client's age is less than 6 weeks. 
Check for any other vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first IPV dose.
@guidance = Should not vaccinate client with second IPV dose as the latest IPV dose was administered less than 4 weeks ago. 
Check for any other vaccines due and inform the caregiver when to come back for the second dose.
@guidance = Should not vaccinate client with third IPV dose as the latest IPV dose was administered less than 4 weeks ago. 
Check for any other vaccines due and inform the caregiver when to come back for the third dose.
*/
define "Client is not due for IPV vaccination Guidance":
  case
    when "Client is not due for IPV vaccination Case 1" then 'Shold not vaccinate client with first IPV dose as client\'s age is less than 6 weeks. 
Check for any other vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first IPV dose.'
    when "Client is not due for IPV vaccination Case 2" then 'Should not vaccinate client with second IPV dose as the latest IPV dose was administered less than 4 weeks ago. 
Check for any other vaccines due and inform the caregiver when to come back for the second dose.'
    when "Client is not due for IPV vaccination Case 3" then 'Should not vaccinate client with third IPV dose as the latest IPV dose was administered less than 4 weeks ago. 
Check for any other vaccines due and inform the caregiver when to come back for the third dose.'
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Client's age is more than or equal to 6 weeks
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Client is due for IPV vaccination Case 1
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
The latest poliovirus dose was administered more than 4 weeks ago
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Client is due for IPV vaccination Case 2
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Client is due for IPV vaccination Case 3
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Client is due for IPV vaccination
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Client is due for IPV vaccination Guidance

/*
@output: Client is due for IPV vaccination Guidance
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with first IPV dose as client is within appropriate age range. 
Check for contraindications.
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with second IPV dose as the latest IPV dose was administered more than 4 weeks ago.
Check for contraindications.
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with third IPV dose as the latest poliovirus dose was administered more than 4 weeks ago. 
Check for contraindications.
*/
define "Client is due for IPV vaccination Guidance":
  case
    when "Client is due for IPV vaccination Case 1" then 'Should vaccinate client with first IPV dose as client is within appropriate age range. 
Check for contraindications.'
    when "Client is due for IPV vaccination Case 2" then 'Should vaccinate client with second IPV dose as the latest IPV dose was administered more than 4 weeks ago.
Check for contraindications.'
    when "Client is due for IPV vaccination Case 3" then 'Should vaccinate client with third IPV dose as the latest poliovirus dose was administered more than 4 weeks ago. 
Check for contraindications.'
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Three poliovirus primary series doses were administered
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Date of First Primary Series Polio Dose
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Client's age was more than 6 weeks when the primary series was started
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Polio immunization schedule is complete Case 1
IMMZD2DTPolioElements
Polio Booster Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Polio Booster Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Number of Polio Booster Series Doses Administered
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Polio booster dose was administered
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Polio immunization schedule is complete Case 2
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Polio immunization schedule is complete
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Polio immunization schedule is complete Guidance
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
Client's age was 6 weeks when the primary series was started
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
The latest poliovirus dose was administered less than 6 months ago
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Primary series is complete. Client is not due for IPV booster dose
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Primary series is complete. Client is not due for IPV booster dose Guidance
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
The latest poliovirus dose was administered more than 6 months ago
IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
No polio booster dose was administered
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Primary series is complete. Client is due for IPV booster dose
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Primary series is complete. Client is due for IPV booster dose Guidance
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Guidance

/*
@dynamicValue: Guidance
*/
define "Guidance":
  case 
    when "Client is not due for IPV vaccination" then "Client is not due for IPV vaccination Guidance"
    when "Client is due for IPV vaccination" then "Client is due for IPV vaccination Guidance"
    when "Polio immunization schedule is complete" then "Polio immunization schedule is complete Guidance"
    when "Primary series is complete. Client is not due for IPV booster dose" then "Primary series is complete. Client is not due for IPV booster dose Guidance"
    when "Primary series is complete. Client is due for IPV booster dose" then "Primary series is complete. Client is due for IPV booster dose Guidance" 
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnlyLogic
Has Guidance

define "Has Guidance":
  "Guidance" is not null and "Guidance" != ''
IMMZCommon
onOrBefore

/**
 * @description: Gets immunizations on or before a date
 */
define fluent function onOrBefore(immunizations List<Immunization>, beforeDate Date):
  immunizations I where
    I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before beforeDate
IMMZCommon
seriesPrimary

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series
 */
define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value string): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToBoolean
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToConcept

define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept):
    if concept is null then
        null
    else
        System.Concept {
            codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C),
            display: concept.text.value
        }
FHIRHelpers
ToCode

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding):
    if coding is null then
        null
    else
        System.Code {
          code: coding.code.value,
          system: coding.system.value,
          version: coding.version.value,
          display: coding.display.value
        }
WHOCommon
mostRecent

define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  Last(
    immunizations I
      sort by start of occurrence.toInterval()
  )
WHOCommon
earliest

define fluent function earliest(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  First(
    immunizations I
      sort by start of occurrence.toInterval()
  )
IMMZCommon
seriesBooster

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the Booster series
 */
define fluent function seriesBooster(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Booster dose' )

parameter.name: Client is due for IPV vaccination
Primary series is complete. Client is due for IPV booster dose

name: IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnly
title: IMMZ.D2.DT.Polio.IPV-only
description:
IMMZ.D2.DT.Polio.IPV-only
Inactivated polio vaccine (IPV)-only (in countries, in polio-free regions, with a very low risk of importation and sustained high routine immunization coverage (third dose of the diphtheria–tetanus–pertussis vaccine [DTP3] > 90%)

relatedArtifact.citation: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

extension.valueMarkdown: A primary 3-dose series of IPV administered beginning at 6 or 8 weeks of age, with a minimum 4-week interval between doses, is recommended.
